options.nuit-interop.title: Nuit Interop Configuration
options.nuit-interop.interoperability.to: If enabled, the mod will attempt to read/load MCPatcher/OptiFine Custom Skies.
options.nuit-interop.mode.tooltip:
- Native: Uses a reimplementation of OptiFine.
- Conversion: Converts OptiFine format to Nuit existing sky types.
options.nuit-interop.process_optifine.to: If enabled, the mod will attempt to read/load OptiFine Custom Skies.
options.nuit-interop.process_mcpatcher.t: If enabled, the mod will attempt to read/load MCPatcher Custom Skies.
options.nuit-interop.process_fabricskybo: If enabled, the mod will attempt to read/load legacy FabricSkyBoxes skybox JSON.
options.nuit-interop.debug_mode.tooltip: If enabled, the mod will output conversion results and error logs in conversion process.
If enabled, the mod will not process/convert MCPatcher/OptiFine if Nuit skies are detected.
options.nuit-interop.dump_data.tooltip: Dump converted skies from Nuit Interop to ".minecraft/nuit-interop-dump" and open the directory. (Note: The original directory will be deleted.)
